Peter,
Tonight, I went head to head against Ben Ray Lujan’s DC partisan, political playbook and _**our New Mexico values campaign won the day!**_

It was an honor to fight for our New Mexico values live on TV, and I can’t wait to keep fighting for you everyday in the Senate. Ben Ray Lujan thought he could recite DNC talking points about how Republicans are evil, but that’s not going to work in this race and it didn’t work in tonight’s debate. New Mexicans know that I am fighting for them and that I will do everything I can, even working across the aisle, to help build a safer, more prosperous New Mexico.

clean_body: | | | | Peter, Tonight, I went head to head against Ben Ray Lujan’s DC partisan, political playbook and our New Mexico values campaign won the day! It was an honor to fight for our New Mexico values live on TV, and I can’t wait to keep fighting for you everyday in the Senate. If you can, | | | Ben Ray Lujan thought he could recite DNC talking points about how Republicans are evil, but that’s not going to work in this race and it didn’t work in tonight’s debate. New Mexicans know that I am fighting for them and that I will do everything I can, even working across the aisle, to help build a safer, more prosperous New Mexico. | | | Thank you so much for your incredible support, Mark P.S. Tonight our New Mexico values campaign defeated Ben Ray Lujan’s DC partisan political playbook. He thought he could win by reciting DNC talking points about how Republicans are evil, but the people of New Mexico know me and my campaign. They know that I will work across the aisle to bring real change to our state. | "Facebook" | "Twitter" | "Instagram" ---|---|--- PAID FOR BY MARK RONCHETTI FOR NEW MEXICO ==

name: Supreme Court Update (via MJ Hegar)
subject: Did you see what Ted Cruz said?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by MJ for Texas
body:
Kavanaugh and Gorsuch were not extreme enough!

|
---
[](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891cae/7f51f7bc/44b947b5/4efbaf59/1796138823/VEsH/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/logo?refcode=emaillogo&amount=5")

| | Peter,

Did you see what Ted Cruz said about President Trump's Supreme Court picks? He argued that they **_were not extreme enough._** Seriously? We shouldn't be picking extremist justices who will upset the balance of the court for a lifetime appointment, and we deserve a senator who will look out for the PEOPLE of Texas and their rights!

Sen. Cornyn has thrown his support behind nominating a justice this year -- and has already voiced his support for overturning the Affordable Care Act and taking away health care from millions of Americans through the courts. Sen. Cruz even said "we're just _one_ vote away" from repeal. Unbelievable.

Will you help us elect MJ and put an end to these **_extremist_** justices that are being appointed? | [PITCH IN $10 NOW](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891cae/7f51f7bc/44b947b5/4efbaf58/1796138823/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjIyNDMifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-finalcountdown?refcode=email_20201005.4nd__2243__&amount=10")
---

Born and raised on a small farm in Nambe, New Mexico, by a union ironworker and a public school employee, Ben Ray is running for Senate to build a better future for all families.

Ben Ray knows that our communities are stronger when everyone has a fair shot. He's dedicated his career to creating good-paying jobs for hardworking New Mexicans, expanding health care, and protecting our natural resources.

As Assistant Speaker in the U.S. House of Representatives, Ben Ray has worked to pass a people-first agenda that helps all Americans -- from lowering prescription drug prices to preventing gun violence, protecting our immigrant communities, improving equity in our criminal justice system, and removing the dark influence of money in politics. He is proud to be endorsed by Planned Parenthood Action Fund, NARAL Pro-Choice America, AFSCME, American Nurses Association, League of Conservation Voters, Brady Campaign to End Gun Violence, Giffords, Human Rights Campaign, Latino Victory Fund, Congressional Black Caucus PAC, Council for a Livable World, and End Citizens United.

**Ben Ray doesn 't take a dollar from corporate PACs. Will you pitch in to fund our people-powered movement today?** **[DONATE](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6bde2/18e32a7f/4b2bec04/7b20bc03/3456359958/VEsHBw/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/brl_email?refcode=email_footer_donate&amount=25")** We know that we send you a lot of emails. If you would like to only receive the most important updates, [_click here_](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6bde2/18e32a7f/4b2bec04/7b20bc00/3456359958/VEsHBg/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/s/fewer-emails").

If you would like to unsubscribe completely, we understand. You can keep up with our campaign by visiting us on _[Facebook](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6bde2/18e32a7f/4b2bec04/7b20bc01/3456359958/VEsHAQ/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://www.facebook.com/BenRayLujan/")_ or _[Twitter](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6bde2/18e32a7f/4b2bec04/7b20bc0d/3456359958/VEsHAA/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://twitter.com/benraylujan")_ or _[Youtube](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6bde2/18e32a7f/4b2bec04/7b20bc0f/3456359958/VEsHAw/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://www.youtube.com/c/benraylujan")_ or online at _[benraylujan.com](www.benraylujan.com)_. clean_body: I have good news and bad news, friend. The good news is that yesterday, we were thrilled to share that a new poll shows us leading the fight to flip PA-10 blue! But unfortunately, we fell short of our important Rapid Response fundraising goal, which could seriously impact our ability to keep up our momentum in this final stretch. = | = Thank you, Eugene On Mon, Oct 5, 2020 at 12:32 PM EugeneForCongress.com wrote: = = We just got a new poll -- and Eugene is SURGING in the fight to represent PA-10 in Congress. = = Team, this poll proves that South Central Pennsylvanians are ready to reject Scott Perry and his radical agenda -- but with less than a month to go, we still have a fight ahead of us. Just yesterday, we shared that a National Republican super PAC is spending $435,000 to prop up Scott Perry and influence our race. How we fight back now will determine whether or not we can maintain our momentum and flip this seat blue in just a few short weeks. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = = = = = = Thank you, Team Eugene We know that COVID-19 has impacted so many in our community, and we have adapted our campaign to this changing environment. During this difficult time, please only consider contributing to our campaign if you’re able to. Eugene DePasquale is running for Congress to represent Pennsylvania's 10th district. To learn more, please visit . Follow Eugene on social media for campaign updates: This campaign is powered by people, not special interests. name: Jake Duesenberg
subject: Walz Emergency Powers Extension
body:
| [ ](http://www.action4liberty.com/?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=these_two_things&n=1)
---
Peter \-- Governor Walz is expected to extend his emergency powers another time this week, marking over 200 days of this declared "emergency". But this extension is a tad different. When the Legislature reconvenes (likely this Friday), this vote will be the last vote to End Walz' Emergency Powers before the important November election. Which means the pressure for these legislators is the highest its ever been. **Action 4 Liberty is the group applying the pressure on the four Democrats needed to finally pass the End Walz Emergency Powers resolution.** So I have two things to ask of you and the tens of thousands of supporters reading this message. Please help us with at least one of them. Will you contact these Democrat legislators who need to hear from Minnesotans that Walz' Emergency Powers are hurting our economy and infringing on our freedoms? **Rep Brad Tabke - 651-296-8872 / [rep.brad.tabke@house.mn](mailto:rep.brad.tabke@house.mn)** **Rep Rob Ecklund - 651-296-2190 /[rep.rob.ecklund@house.mn](mailto:rep.rob.ecklund@house.mn)** **Rep Dan Wolgamott - 651-296-6612 /[rep.dan.wolgamott@house.mn](mailto:rep.dan.wolgamott@house.mn)** **Rep Jeff Brand - 651-296-8634 /[rep.jeff.brand@house.mn](mailto:rep.jeff.brand@house.mn)** **Rep John Persell - 651-296-5516 /[rep.john.persell@house.mn](mailto:rep.john.persell@house.mn)** **Rep Zack Stephenson - 651-296-5513 / [rep.zack.stephenson@house.mn ](mailto:rep.zack.stephenson@house.mn)** **Script:** Rep ______, Democrats often tell us they believe in democracy, but you continue allowing Governor Walz to unilaterally write laws. Giving one man this much power is the most anti-democratic principles this country has ever faced. Governor Walz has used those powers to harm businesses in our community. Emergency Powers are not needed for 200 days and I demand you vote to remove Walz’ Emergency Powers in the October Special Session. I also expect to see you stand up to Democratic leadership if they try to block an actual vote on the Resolution. **Alternate Script:** Rep ______, as a voter I was upset to hear that Democrat Speaker Hortman is not going to allow a vote on the Emergency Powers this Friday. If that happens, I hold you responsible for it. You have a duty to vote on the Resolution according to Statute 12.31. Vote YES and don't let Democrat leadership stop a clean vote. We need you to stand up for the small businesses being hurt by Governor Walz. Stop giving one man unilateral power to create laws. That is not a democracy. Secondly, if calling legislators isn't your thing, please financially support Action 4 Liberty as we spend tens of thousands of dollars on targeted digital and mail ads against these legislators. We are only $2,000 from hitting our full budget this week. Can you help us out? | [](https://action4liberty.nationbuilder.com/donate?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=these_two_things&n=2 "DONATE") [DONATE](https://action4liberty.nationbuilder.com/donate?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=these_two_things&n=3)
---
Action 4 Liberty has ads like this up on YouTube, Facebook and other platforms as we speak. We are able to reach 20,000 potential voters in each of our targeted districts, multiple times using our model.
[](https://www.action4liberty.com/end_walz_brand_commercial?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=these_two_things&n=4)
We're at a critical time in the battle to restore our liberties and End Walz' Emergency Powers. Everything that happens now will impact the important November election.
We still need 4 Democrats to flip their vote if we want to End Walz' Powers.
**Democrat politicians Brad Tabke, Dan Wolgamott, Rob Ecklund and Jeff Brand better vote for their people and not their Party's governor in October or they'll need to start looking for another job!**
Our message is going directly to voters in their districts so they know exactly how they are killing businesses and trampling on our civil liberties. As politicians like Brad Tabke are campaigning, we'll be there telling voters in 55A how Brad puts Walz ahead of them!
We need to inform voters in Shakopee about Brad Tabke, St Cloud about Dan Wolgamott, Northern Minnesota about Rob Ecklund and Southern Minnesota about Jeff Brand. Will you help us out?
## [SUPPORT ACTION 4 LIBERTY](https://action4liberty.nationbuilder.com/donate?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=these_two_things&n=5)
When politicians see their friends like Brad Tabke suffer embarrassment in front of voters, it sends a strong message to their friends to not cross us. They either support liberty or we deliver the pain!
[**Please help us put the pressure on these politicians. Pitch in $100 NOW if you can. If that's too much, help us out with $50 or $25. Or get us a lot of air play with a generous donation of $1,000.**](https://action4liberty.nationbuilder.com/donate?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=these_two_things&n=6)
**In Liberty,

**
**Jake Duesenberg**
**President, Action 4 Liberty**
Action 4 Liberty · United States
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](dpwillis67@gmail.com). To stop receiving emails, [click here](https://www.action4liberty.com/unsubscribe?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=these_two_things&n=7).
You can also keep up with Jake Duesenberg on [Facebook](https://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6nyVoJL5zCIi1gu8lCoYmQrA8P7rhuOjJmdy-IRmglie&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=these_two_things&n=8).
Created with [NationBuilder](https://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=SWqLExi-4iBlEOa5qgO58jA2d62deOsOLwOgchKDecY&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=these_two_things&n=9), software for leaders.

Friend,

I’ll get right to the point. While our campaign is gaining momentum by the day, Vern’s campaign is being lifted up by personal loans and corporate backers — and the amount of money at his disposal is concerning.

**He has raised more than $3 MILLION so far in this election that he is spending against me in the final weeks of this campaign.**

We have broken records with our fundraising and the money we raise is being spent to communicate with voters — which is expensive. That is why I am writing to you today — and I’ll be blunt: in order to stay on TV this week, we need to raise $25,000 before Friday.

**[Please, can you help us close this spending gap by contributing right now to help us keep our ads up on television next week? name: Jason Yates, My Faith Votes
subject: 28-Days of Prayer Starts Today!
body:
| | Download the FREE Prayer Guide
---
[ ](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=6_nuz-gPbh4AR2HufX66iZsniBH06zw0PsoYmPLXYDc_UlB1zhVrI7iWz_IbQxFmWW6E2TNMOe4DeuNNB5zp9TJKfyMPAxPBd0XVEELQdqM&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e201006pry01&n=1)
| Peter, Today, we are 28-days away from the November 3 elections. And, our country is in desperate need of prayer. We are launching a national prayer effort between now and the elections to see millions of believers set aside time to pray for our country. [**Join us in prayer and download your free 28-day prayer guide in English or Spanish.**](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=6_nuz-gPbh4AR2HufX66iZsniBH06zw0PsoYmPLXYDc_UlB1zhVrI7iWz_IbQxFmWW6E2TNMOe4DeuNNB5zp9TJKfyMPAxPBd0XVEELQdqM&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e201006pry01&n=2) You can use this guide to pray individually, as a family, or with other believers. 1 John 5:14 says, “This is the confidence we have in approaching God: that if we ask anything according to his will, he hears us.” We need God welcomed in our public square, prayer honored in our schools, and the Ten Commandments revered in our courtrooms. It is America’s foundation of faith that has made our country strong. If we hope to see unity, respect, civility, and, most of all, biblical values protected in our country, we must begin by falling to our knees in prayer for our nation. Unite with us in prayer to see America be a nation whose God is the Lord. Now is the time to align our hearts with His. Join us in prayer, and please share this unique 28-day prayer guide with others. [****](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=6_nuz-gPbh4AR2HufX66iZsniBH06zw0PsoYmPLXYDc_UlB1zhVrI7iWz_IbQxFmWW6E2TNMOe4DeuNNB5zp9TJKfyMPAxPBd0XVEELQdqM&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e201006pry01&n=3)[](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=6_nuz-gPbh4AR2HufX66iZsniBH06zw0PsoYmPLXYDc_UlB1zhVrI7iWz_IbQxFmWW6E2TNMOe4DeuNNB5zp9TJKfyMPAxPBd0XVEELQdqM&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e201006pry01&n=4) **Pray. Think. Vote.** Jason Yates
CEO
[](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=FvZODUdzRCV4_QVEoUI5Y_LYDGbWPUdf00keax2EMv8&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e201006pry01&n=5)
---
* * *
You subscribed [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com) to receive email updates from My Faith Votes. Our goal is to provide valuable content that equips you to prayerfully and thoughtfully take action in the public square. To update your subscription preferences or unsubscribe, click below.

[Update Subscription Preferences or Unsubscribe](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/unsubscribe?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e201006pry01&n=6)

© 2020 My Faith Votes, 10940 S Parker Rd, #640, Parker, CO 80134, United States

name: Team Northam
subject: Let's flip the 5th CD!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Way Ahead PO Box 597
body:
|
---

---

---
| | [](https://act.myngp.com/el/W1BqYGBf3uxVrcCxCjuBkz4-3Q1TzjFolFiX0TTmTPU=/9Zm9d9Tch4PrKJou7btTGPipuwcCb8R2EceDVxn5aX0=) _Here at The Way Ahead PAC, we recognize that our world is going through a very uncertain and difficult time right now --a time when it's hard to think of anything but the well-being of our own family and friends. Please only make a donation if you can afford to do so._
---
Friend With just a month to go until election day, we have the opportunity to flip another district in Virginia. Dr. Cameron Webb is locked in a dead heat race in Virginia's 5th District. A practicing physician, Dr. Webb lives in Charlottesville where he treats patients as a general internist, teaches medical students at UVA and serves as the Director of Health Policy and Equity at UVA's School of Medicine. Cameron is running for Congress to better serve his community at this critical time. In Washington, he will be a fierce advocate to ensure opportunities for the health and success of all Virginians. **[The political analysts are calling the race a "toss-up." We can't allow the far-right wing to get another seat in Congress. Help Dr. Webb today so we can turn this seat blue. ](https://act.myngp.com/el/W1BqYGBf3uxVrcCxCjuBkz4-3Q1TzjFolFiX0TTmTPU=/rqdFd6jifuFFG3F2qKPFIa0IB5UDkz3Q689aVguIMaQ=)** We are facing a once in a generation pandemic, and now more than ever, we need a medical professional in Washington. Dr. Cameron Webb will work hand in hand with our administration to get Virginia through this pandemic and get our economy back on track. **[Can you rush a donation to Dr. Webb today, so he can have the resources he needs to combat the attacks and get his message out](https://act.myngp.com/el/W1BqYGBf3uxVrcCxCjuBkz4-3Q1TzjFolFiX0TTmTPU=/rqdFd6jifuFFG3F2qKPFIa0IB5UDkz3Q689aVguIMaQ=)?** Dr. Webb needs our support. Let's do everything we can between now and November 3rd to make sure we keep Virginia blue. Thank you, **Team Northam** [](https://act.myngp.com/el/W1BqYGBf3uxVrcCxCjuBkz4-3Q1TzjFolFiX0TTmTPU=/rqdFd6jifuFFG3F2qKPFIa0IB5UDkz3Q689aVguIMaQ=)

name: MJ
subject: Kavanaugh. Two years ago today.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by MJ for Texas
body:
An extremist justice was confirmed to the Supreme Court.

|
---
[](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891ca8/7f51f7bc/44b1b9d1/4efbaf4e/2694803019/VEsH/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/logo?refcode=emaillogo&amount=5")

| | Peter,

Two years ago today, Sen. Cornyn voted to confirm extremist Brett Kavanaugh to the Supreme Court. **That was a lifetime appointment, and now he 's jumping at the chance to fill Ruth Bader Ginsburg's vacancy while he still can, which will shift the Court for generations.**

If Sen. Cornyn gets his way, the Supreme Court could:
* Overturn Roe v. Wade
* Abolish the Affordable Care Act
* Eliminate access to reproductive health care for tens of millions of people
* Restrict the rights of the LGBTQ+ community

| [FIGHT BACK NOW](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891ca8/7f51f7bc/44b1b9d1/4efbaf4d/2694803019/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjIyNTEifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-finalcountdown?refcode=email_20201006.1nd__2251__&amount=10")
---
We deserve a senator who treats the Supreme Court with the respect it deserves, not as something that can be abused to advance a partisan goal.

We are at a crossroads, Peter, and what happens in the coming weeks will determine the Court's direction for decades. **[Will you pitch in to help me beat spineless Sen. Cornyn this November?](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891ca8/7f51f7bc/44b1b9d1/4efbaf4d/2694803019/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjIyNTEifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-finalcountdown?refcode=email_20201006.1nd__2251__&amount=10")**

body:
Did you know? You don’t need to wait until November 3rd to vote for Governor Holcomb. You can cast a ballot for Governor Holcomb starting today! | |

Friend \- did you know?

name: Josh Hicks
subject: About last night
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Josh Hicks for Congress
body:
Last night was the chance I’ve been waiting for — an opportunity to speak directly to voters about the difference between me and Andy Barr. If you were able to tune in, I hope you saw that this race isn’t just about winning an election, it’s about bringing a voice for the regular people of Kentucky’s 6th District to Congress.

|
---

| | Hey team, Last night was the chance I’ve been waiting for — an opportunity to speak directly to voters about the difference between me and Andy Barr. If you were able to tune in, I hope you saw that this race isn’t just about winning an election. It’s about being a voice for the regular people of Kentucky’s 6th District in Congress. **Andy Barr says that he’s going to solve all our problems, but he’s been in Congress for eight years and nothing’s changed.** It’s time this district had someone fighting for them in Washington. [_**Take a look at this moment from our debate last night, and then chip in if you can to help flip this district and send Andy packing in November.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/19989112/255235084/975758762?refcode=fl_email_fr_20201006debatereport_JH_all_xx_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNWRiZmQyMy0wMzA4LWViMTEtOTZmNS0wMDE1NWQwM2FmZmMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qWD44z4H6Tm7OqrZtCMp4b16Rc2EGFlsFgaS_ZuMV7A=) | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/19989113/255235085/-1031520457?refcode=fl_email_fr_20201006debatereport_JH_all_xx_img&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNWRiZmQyMy0wMzA4LWViMTEtOTZmNS0wMDE1NWQwM2FmZmMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qWD44z4H6Tm7OqrZtCMp4b16Rc2EGFlsFgaS_ZuMV7A=)

\-- Josh

\----------- Forwarded Message ----------
From: Team Hicks
Date: October 5, 2020
Subject: What Josh said
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/19989115/255235087/975758762?refcode=fl_email_fr_20201006debatereport_JH_all_xx_hdr&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNWRiZmQyMy0wMzA4LWViMTEtOTZmNS0wMDE1NWQwM2FmZmMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qWD44z4H6Tm7OqrZtCMp4b16Rc2EGFlsFgaS_ZuMV7A=)
Hey everyone,
Just a few minutes ago, voters finally had a chance to hear directly from the candidates in the first debate of the campaign.
**Here's what Josh had to say in his closing argument:**
_"I’m running this race as a kid from Fleming County who served his country as a Marine, who served his community as a police officer, and now who serves his clients in the best way he can. Because service means something to me. It’s been a huge part of my life, for a long time._ _I got in this race because I’m sick and tired of lying politicians. I got in this race because I’m sick and tired of folks trying to strip away coverage from people with preexisting conditions.__I am sick and tired of politicians selling us out to pharmaceutical companies, to Wall Street, to payday lenders. __I’m sick and tired of having to listen to the stories of folks who have tried to approach our Representative in Congress and tell him "the ACA saved my life."_ _I’m sick and tired of hearing these stories, but let’s be very clear. This race is not about me. It’s not about him. __This race is about you, and who you think will represent you the best in the US Congress, so I ask for your vote between now and November 3."_
---
Now, we’re glad we had a chance to set the record straight tonight. Andy Barr has been invited to _four more debates or forums_ — but he hasn’t said yes to a single one.
[_**Can you chip in $4, $14, or whatever you can afford now to help us keep getting our message to voters?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/19989117/255235089/975758762?refcode=fl_email_fr_20201006debatereport_JH_all_ld_l1&amount=14&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNWRiZmQyMy0wMzA4LWViMTEtOTZmNS0wMDE1NWQwM2FmZmMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qWD44z4H6Tm7OqrZtCMp4b16Rc2EGFlsFgaS_ZuMV7A=)
**Folks in the 6th District deserve to hear from the candidates seeking their votes. And candidates should be willing to speak about and stand behind their records.**

clean_body: Last night was the chance I’ve been waiting for — an opportunity to speak directly to voters about the difference between me and Andy Barr. If you were able to tune in, I hope you saw that this race isn’t just about winning an election, it’s about bringing a voice for the regular people of Kentucky’s 6th District to Congress. | | | Hey team, Last night was the chance I’ve been waiting for — an opportunity to speak directly to voters about the difference between me and Andy Barr. If you were able to tune in, I hope you saw that this race isn’t just about winning an election. It’s about being a voice for the regular people of Kentucky’s 6th District in Congress. Andy Barr says that he’s going to solve all our problems, but he’s been in Congress for eight years and nothing’s changed. It’s time this district had someone fighting for them in Washington. = | = If you missed the debate last night, you can check out the initial report from my team below — and hopefully, this won’t be the last chance voters get to hear directly from the candidates in this race. \-- Josh | = \----------- Forwarded Message ---------- From: Team Hicks Date: October 5, 2020 Subject: What Josh said = Hey everyone, Just a few minutes ago, voters finally had a chance to hear directly from the candidates in the first debate of the campaign. Here's what Josh had to say in his closing argument: "I’m running this race as a kid from Fleming County who served his country as a Marine, who served his community as a police officer, and now who serves his clients in the best way he can. Because service means something to me. It’s been a huge part of my life, for a long time. I got in this race because I’m sick and tired of lying politicians. I got in this race because I’m sick and tired of folks trying to strip away coverage from people with preexisting conditions.I am sick and tired of politicians selling us out to pharmaceutical companies, to Wall Street, to payday lenders. I’m sick and tired of having to listen to the stories of folks who have tried to approach our Representative in Congress and tell him "the ACA saved my life." I’m sick and tired of hearing these stories, but let’s be very clear. This race is not about me. It’s not about him. This race is about you, and who you think will represent you the best in the US Congress, so I ask for your vote between now and November 3." Now, we’re glad we had a chance to set the record straight tonight. Andy Barr has been invited to four more debates or forums — but he hasn’t said yes to a single one. = Folks in the 6th District deserve to hear from the candidates seeking their votes. And candidates should be willing to speak about and stand behind their records. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = Thanks, Team Hicks PS: Missed the debate? Check out Team Hicks on or Josh’s for updates! | Josh Hicks is a Democrat running to represent the hardworking, everyday folks of Kentucky’s 6th Congressional District. He will be a representative who puts the needs of his constituents front and center in Washington, not corporations or dark-money donors. That means his campaign is relying on grassroots donations — lots of small donations from emails like this — not big checks from corporate special interests. Please consider making a contribution today. | = * | Paid For By Josh Hicks for Congress Josh Hicks for Congress PO Box 1214 Lexington, KY 40588 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please .

subject: Marie Claire Magazine: Pay attention to Pat Hackett IN02
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pat Hackett for Congress
body:
An international magazine gives a shoutout to Pat Hackett. | | | | [ ](https://foundationbluemedia.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c156e612ce88db66e08a28197&id=ccdd681e89&e=5886ca081d)
---
| | | [ ](https://foundationbluemedia.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c156e612ce88db66e08a28197&id=5b0aca9c2f&e=5886ca081d)
---
| Dear Friend,

Marie Claire, an international magazine that focuses on global issues and women around the world recognizes Pat Hackett and Indiana 02 as a race to pay attention to on November 3rd. As the article noted:

---
| | [“Time and time again, we are reminded that the only way to ensure we live in a democracy that works for all of us is to elect leaders that are truly interested in representing the people, and working towards a progressive future.”](https://foundationbluemedia.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c156e612ce88db66e08a28197&id=e64738c5cf&e=5886ca081d)
---
|
Pat is that leader for IN02. Pat is bringing energy to so many across this district. People who have never participated in an election before are getting involved and volunteering for the first time.

This excitement is not just from Democrats and Independents.

Republicans are coming up to Pat after hearing her speak and saying, “You’ve sealed the deal, I’m voting for you.” Why? Because Pat is a principled leader. She will represent you and she will be a voice on the floor of Congress that will help shape the national discourse.

Early voting starts today. Now more than ever we need Pat’s message to be heard by the broadest audience. [Can you chip in to keep Pat’s message of Dignity and Justice for All up on TV](https://foundationbluemedia.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c156e612ce88db66e08a28197&id=36838566fc&e=5886ca081d)? We have four weeks to go and many people still to reach.

---
| [CHIP IN $10](https://foundationbluemedia.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c156e612ce88db66e08a28197&id=b7baf4cbd7&e=5886ca081d "CHIP IN $10")
---
| [CHIP IN $25](https://foundationbluemedia.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c156e612ce88db66e08a28197&id=04fb043105&e=5886ca081d "CHIP IN $25")
---
| [CHIP IN $50](https://foundationbluemedia.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c156e612ce88db66e08a28197&id=ea171b857b&e=5886ca081d "CHIP IN $50")
---
| [CHIP IN $100](https://foundationbluemedia.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c156e612ce88db66e08a28197&id=66c5bf9e4f&e=5886ca081d "CHIP IN $100")
---
| [CHIP IN SOMETHING ELSE](https://foundationbluemedia.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c156e612ce88db66e08a28197&id=ec9317cbbc&e=5886ca081d "CHIP IN SOMETHING ELSE")
---
| _If you’ve saved your information with ActBlue, your donation will go through automatically._

Thank you!
Team Hackett
---
|

| Pat Hackett is a lifelong advocate for her community. Now, she's running for Congress to reclaim the People's House, return authority to the people, and end the corrupting influence of money in politics. She will fight to end corruption in politics so that we can provide healthcare for everyone, end the gun violence epidemic, and address the catastrophic challenges of climate change.

Friend,

You might want to clear your calendar tomorrow morning because Matt and Chris Pappas are hitting the (virtual) debate stage.
|

**CONGRESSIONAL DEBATE**
_Matt Mowers vs. Chris Pappas_
**Wednesday, October 7 at 9:00 AM**
|
---
There are several ways to tune in to the debate:
1\. Listen to the live broadcast on NHPR

2\. Listen online at **[NHPR.org](http://links.mowersforcongress.com/u/click?_t=40916cb2eb47469286d89e7d5b57adeb&_m=66c8d342768e4ec9b3e04804945d32c6&_e=vsG5HZTxR0LOt86kMTzSuUoO_ZojEkdE7yU_3h33pgSlr41QtMI2ICAnexRz0hZY6FHgz-uWAtTaCfuETinmUp8-wwU_cX9aRLqUOOBycb3AI261x5DXLOQKqOiCpStqwWr-O-OkAscV6NAE_jgkqdrk4Rz5eUTbWDDKO7pq4eOo5zEBWvg_35K2XfscbXdgWPsdk8VUujC8eUfKPZ6Dbr2HeKeVPebj1JKfD5v86ReO0YTdlkUj_YhIpHGDjmq26VN_A8oXrEgOG6tlHJGoORe_4vu4cKe9MXRrwJmRsfDujhW3Ul33Xey-7szztutfRKEvPnz9SoI-RamKKHLwgyigKMZ3B8h_FcNdhhbVZs86XwRAuapVexQ2jPF7l7OrpOXLhFAvTMuNfPH6Twrlv3SkR5YGyTkp0YLhC_Y4_QFOsS2SRReDfkuwYyVCsXeF)**

3\. Watch the livestream on **[NHPR’s Facebook page](http://links.mowersforcongress.com/u/click?_t=40916cb2eb47469286d89e7d5b57adeb&_m=66c8d342768e4ec9b3e04804945d32c6&_e=vsG5HZTxR0LOt86kMTzSuWv_KQg-MU8jovhGM81qhE1ToigmnVsY07X0k7LkYaQZdu_id5Rv04nPhTIl_wplfO3ec-qqKexNkwr9C3q5IxncfSknRWBTdg9HL8ql_N9opwan2DzU3eHs6IT3OT9ME6GnhpPidYi91XKa_Z-bAncD_h2hC8vk7o2dzSw21k1SPgYpwC4pZz2J3FeN3ELJMjSZbN3DTp-chEdm7yaGNAba1GTh2H5mlaL1IOc6bCWAvFFJWcgv5gfWlTDyqcW5pnD8xH7KErBfJPf6ENTVyifI2MdJUx4_9EvdS2Je2UN5BxoV57ykyiqzvKTVwNze5blmlcJ1uyr2hS0YXcU9knS1iQNABY1SrXQDJ5vFudnev9kR5xvpSwHnBBLoVCXaiHviFqhQyd8thhVSDg6oyM5194RbJpxoPwmmY5hPRWD-XkluKtjNQHRxBZLywYucNA%3D%3D)**

Trust us - you don’t want to miss this. **So clear your calendar and be sure to tune in tomorrow morning at 9:00 AM!**

Thank you,

name: Beto O'Rourke
subject: I have some very exciting news
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY POWERED BY PEOPLE
body:
[1]Powered By People

I’ve got some exciting news for you. In fact, this is the most exciting
thing that’s happened since we started Powered by People.

But first, let me give you an idea of how far we’ve come and what we have
left to do.

Over the last 7 months, Powered by People volunteers have registered over
100,000 voters and made over 40 million voter contact attempts. These new
voters and these newly engaged voters could make the difference in
critical elections up and down the ballot.

Now, with early voting about to start, and Election Day so close we can
see it, we have to bring it home and turn them out.

That means calling every potential Democratic voter in the state and
helping them make a commitment to vote on the first day of Early Voting.

So, on Monday October 12th, we will host the [ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/43676?t=1001&akid=107886%2E444211%2Eqgh8l0 ]Calling Texas: The Million
Voter Phone Bank, and we won’t be doing it alone. Here’s where the big
news that I was telling you about comes in.

We’ll be joined on the phone bank by (get this!!): Oprah Winfrey, Willie
Nelson, Bernie Sanders, Julián Castro, Stacey Abrams and Andrew Yang,
among others.

That’s right: these amazing artists, public servants, and political
leaders are committed to doing their part to make sure we reach every
Texas voter who has the power to decide the outcome of the most important
election in our history.

The question is, will you do yours?

This could be the largest single day voter contact effort in Texas
history, and I want you to be part of it. Plus, Oprah Winfrey, Willie
Nelson, Bernie Sanders, Julián Castro, Stacey Abrams, and Andrew Yang!!!

RSVP here:
[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/43676?source=ema20201006-107886&t=1002&akid=107886%2E444211%2Eqgh8l0 ]Calling Texas: The Million Voter Phone Bank
[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/43676?source=ema20201006-107886&t=1003&akid=107886%2E444211%2Eqgh8l0 ]Monday, October 12

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/43676?source=ema20201006-107886&t=1004&akid=107886%2E444211%2Eqgh8l0 ]Get more info or RSVP »

Let's do this!

Beto

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to act. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://act.betoorourke.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1005&akid=107886%2E444211%2Eqgh8l0

PAID FOR BY POWERED BY PEOPLE

name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: The Left Is Depending on Insults and Lies in Its Bid to Stop Amy Coney Barrett
body:
Judge Amy Coney Barrett “has received extraordinary testimonials from her colleagues and students, who say she is brilliant, conscientious and kind” | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=a5ee47cc54&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| | |
# **The Left Is Depending on Insults and Lies in Its Bid to Stop Amy Coney Barrett**

Judge Amy Coney Barrett “has received extraordinary testimonials from her colleagues and students, who say she is brilliant, conscientious and kind,” Rich Lowry writes in the _New York Post_.

“The opposition has countered with a dog’s breakfast of nonsense, including that her confirmation hearing can’t be held in the middle of a pandemic.” Meanwhile, “the Senate Judiciary Committee has already been holding hybrid in-person and virtual hearings all year. There is no reason the committee can’t do the same with Barrett next week.”

[Click here to read more.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=3e92feef2e&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| “President Trump continues to make progress as he receives treatment for COVID-19 . . . Some in the media are demanding more information about the president’s health as if his doctors should map the president’s entire genome and post it on the Internet. But at this point, Mr. Trump’s condition is well-described and his prognosis appears to be excellent,” Dr. Martin Makary of Johns Hopkins University writes for [Fox News.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=c4e3c493fe&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| “Who will speak for those who have no voice? President Trump’s recent executive order regarding babies born alive answers that question: We will, as fellow Americans. Even as some hospitals question whether babies born ‘too young’ or ‘too disabled’ are worth trying to save, the president’s executive order reminds all of us that they, and we, have both a legal and moral obligation to try,” Mary Vought writes in the [_Washington Examiner_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=eaa57b61f1&e=3ee4985eea).
---
|
---
| “The downtowns of numerous American cities have been burned up. Government buildings have been attacked. Private businesses have been destroyed. And people have even been killed. This has been happening off and on now for many months. And—perhaps most amazing and horrifying of all—the news media has decided to largely ignore it,” Neil Patel writes in [_The Daily Signal_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=2f1bcf5f1c&e=3ee4985eea).
---
|

[Privacy Policy](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=04bb2e5a51&e=3ee4985eea) | [Contact the White House](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=70d27f1e75&e=3ee4985eea) | [Unsubscribe](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8cafb01033&e=3ee4985eea&c=8eb624364c)

subject: Seize this moment, Team!
body:
| | | [](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/mRshnjzLbfRUAJcmEcvG0wrDB7MtwPLuSSi4jwn1dr2AEKKvrxXLDWyyWUDJ9fIh3cA_yNrSXYaQXjbaKQCTUlofLJ4kmaD8hMQQrIvoxrfFVwq_P1_jqnJRrojYnzMTsvHu-clnJu_rSFNK9Hy0yXVoQoV0MTufqNmMtlwm6epgQ_HVqS0ei8YPrNIopBbNW2fAm_4h3KqdLpKEdQJsZpCAVSdWdyPUFjNhht3orLdGBN6EqiiBAMYQUaNUXQpmKwLlYVM-RuHw8dHhi2BMwNKJSCQ39u-wKuJLsfRvtRFpQLbG3zDD-yNaxsjdRhKZ/35s/Y1CLs36QS0OgWE_pV5L-_A/h0/god04X6WPGp0elWF5G0dDihjnkHvUcAMeg2JKejqQTM) For weeks now, Team, we've been sounding the alarm over the risks that Trump's rallies pose to those who attend them. **Few masks. No social distancing. Little regard for the undeniable dangers of COVID-19.**

Now, with **Trump testing positive for COVID** less than a week after holding rallies in Middletown, PA and Duluth, MN, **our fears have been realized.**

With this news, **there has never been a more effective time** to bring home the message to the residents of these swing state towns that **Trump’s disinformation and recklessness have put their lives at risk.**

name: Marcy, Team Warner Digital Director
subject: $4 for 4 weeks
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner
body:
There are just 4 weeks until Election Day -- can you help us out?
|
---

| | Derek --

Election Day is just **_four weeks away!_**

There's still a lot of work to do to make sure that we send Mark Warner back to the Senate and that we elect Democrats up and down the ticket. Our team is working hard to reach folks across the Commonwealth by phone, by text, and online. **Now, we need your help to keep going.**

[**If you 're able, will you consider chipping in $4 now to help us out in the final 4 weeks?**](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85da78/53d9897e/55b31750/1c88eb7c/3731631871/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6Ijg1MSJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-4weeks?refcode=20201006_f_1_nd__851__&refcode2=ask1&amount=5")

This election is one of the most consequential of our lifetimes -- there's so much on the ballot. Your vote isn't just a vote for Joe Biden or Mark Warner. It's a vote for affordable health care. It's a vote for addressing climate change head-on. It's a vote for an economy that works for _everyone._

**Your vote will help determine our path forward as a country.**

Thank you for your continued support -- you keep this team moving forward!

-- Marcy, Team Warner Digital Director

| [CONTRIBUTE](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85da78/53d9897e/55b31750/1c88eb7b/3731631871/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6Ijg1MSJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-4weeks?refcode=20201006_f_1_nd__851__&refcode2=cont&amount=5")

Williamsburg, VA 23185

Ahead of then, we _must_ build up our Rapid Response Fund to fight back against the false attacks that are sure to come... and to expose the truth about Shaheen’s failed liberal record.
_**[Will you rush a donation RIGHT NOW to help?](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/60d551f83c163028/0f7347579130de9cc3d6b838967d376c/33153)**_

We’re going to tell Granite Staters the truth about career politician Jeanne Shaheen’s record.
* She's fought for socialized medicine.
* She's opposed the Second Amendment.
* She's supported job-killing regulations and liberal policies.

Simply put, Peter, Granite Staters deserve better than six more years of Jeanne Shaheen’s failed leadership.

Granite Staters deserve a proven job-creator, a business leader, and a political outsider focused on results, not political games.

That’s me — and you better believe I’m ready for this debate. But I need your help.

When I take the stage Thursday, I need to know that top supporters like YOU are in my corner, Peter.

I’m counting on you.

-Corky [DEBATE THURSDAY - Rush your contribution!](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/60d551f83c163028/484eae20af1c1121c3d6b838967d376c/33153) | | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/60d551f83c163028/586d7a673ddbb59ec3d6b838967d376c/33153) | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/60d551f83c163028/60db16bd8807ce6ac3d6b838967d376c/33153)

name: Jay Inslee
subject: Why this race should matter to you in Pennsylvania
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JAY INSLEE FOR WASHINGTON (D)
body:
Our wins here are a template for what we could do across the country.
| [](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/8912?t=3&akid=8178%2E868730%2En0PrwP) Friend, When so much is happening in national politics, it might not seem like a governor's race in Washington state should get much of your attention -- but here's why it should: Our success in building bold, transformative, progressive policies in Washington has become a model for the nation. Want proof? We're taking aggressive action on the climate crisis. We've made historic investments in clean energy to grow jobs and tackle the climate crisis, while ranking as the best state to do business. Now, leaders in red and blue states are following our lead and growing their clean energy sector. We had the first cases of COVID-19 in the nation and then became a model for tackling the pandemic through strong, steady, moral leadership. Our success at the state level shows our federal government what is possible, especially as we rebuild from the disastrous Trump administration. **We are the last generation that can do anything about these historic challenges.[Will you chip in $5 or more right now from Pennsylvania to help us win in Washington state?](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/12302?t=4&akid=8178%2E868730%2En0PrwP)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [$5 →](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/12303?t=5&akid=8178%2E868730%2En0PrwP)

The same national political trends that threaten our country's democracy are a force here in Washington. My opponent, Loren Culp, is using Trump's playbook at every turn -- with in-person rallies, disturbing rhetoric, and refusing to wear a mask. Beating back the national trend of that brand of hateful politics must start right here in Washington.
Republicans across the country know all of this. They know that the progress we make here affects them at home, too. So they've been flooding my race with grassroots money to support my extremist, Trump-y opponent. My seat is one of only a handful of governorships Republicans (and the very well-funded Republican Governors Association) can focus on, and they're hoping state races like mine fly under the radar until it's just too late to do anything about it.
We can't let it happen. We can't halt or stall the progress we've made on the climate crisis or COVID-19 or paid family leave or gun violence prevention.
We're not done yet. There's more to do. And we need you on our team to keep up the progress.
**Every win here could be a win in Pennsylvania, too. You in?[Donate $5 or more right now to invest in a win here in Washington state. It will set the stage for the progress yet to come, wherever you are located.](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/12302?t=11&akid=8178%2E868730%2En0PrwP)**
Very truly yours,
Jay

name: Darin LaHood
subject: Let’s make Congress great again
disclaimer_text: Paid for by LaHood for Congress |
body:
Americans are relying on Congress more than ever before – and Congress is failing Americans more than ever before | |
---
[ ](http://links.lahoodforcongress.com/u/click?_t=d5887efe66684ada97976ef2e9d70137&_m=539d61338c7b492a818d038085fac50f&_e=f2lt4Y2vqRbUmXOc2Y9horHc9Cf9rRb7xlx9p3V-VXG7rureYKwho3tOklDHU9Tlz0tCijNjTvgaHeC3iyo-_Bq39IkfjJw3C4Caq1cNKCoWpp9stKgUqicEV3FZnT67wMDC_ghWf5RLM0r3SaXKFTGe4XQiREWIS9YPML9MUq8V58OwmAL2kCz8QaOxlEJNhftiwi7kjEa3GjFBXwF45Q0w8IG8or4-SboPx1yV9i9XzIX8hinJILTC6LfXrlBYT_O31jSpmcxBQa2eGH74isdhpSum3i478bG9TekH2KUd262zKubD8b9jKXlptN5-nOKpYmd7Se2jPswoCEmulXXEuORCAo8eDZ2dOSCU6YSi4pQuxi4rYqHNaWaI_M5Ff-7o4YaLZvh2D4DiJ0QfO22REFSct3Z_tvmb6YQUB_sZVTml1v75ST8uCYq4UPmSA_z1R3JZp8txnyfxdbEIcYaR9gQZzMQbYVjG5c3QaZo%3D)
|
---
Friend,

This fight to take back Congress from Nancy Pelosi is motivated by something greater than just winning political power.

_**It’s about restoring conservative leadership in the House that puts country before party at every turn.**_

_**It’s about rejecting petty partisanship and getting Capitol Hill back to work for Main Street.**_

_**It’s about confronting the historic challenges we’re facing head-on instead of punting them to the next generation to deal with.**_

**_It’s about making Congress great again._**
[**ADD YOUR NAME: It’s Time to Make Congress Great Again**](http://links.lahoodforcongress.com/u/click?_t=d5887efe66684ada97976ef2e9d70137&_m=539d61338c7b492a818d038085fac50f&_e=f2lt4Y2vqRbUmXOc2Y9horHc9Cf9rRb7xlx9p3V-VXG7rureYKwho3tOklDHU9Tlz0tCijNjTvgaHeC3iyo-_Bq39IkfjJw3C4Caq1cNKCoWpp9stKgUqicEV3FZnT67wMDC_ghWf5RLM0r3SaXKFTGe4XQiREWIS9YPML9MUq8V58OwmAL2kCz8QaOxlEJNhftiwi7kjEa3GjFBXwF45Q0w8IG8or4-SboPx1yV9i9XzIX8hinJILTC6LfXrlBYT_O31jSpmcxBQa2eGH74iiCtkk2cpC4kirFKGCm0LmJnwuY2mKgodApuRNccUIvxjV97V8HI2Efl4TAm7DEtvG1I5GEESsTI8fcqC0M8RiI6t2j8zNegAdEZBStPrOaZ4x7DQUpy_9Cn7L76xA4oHGTlCbk0MNyrCfX_po3GJzuaTMIpT-mDrpIHsuvRHwoijnONESMCsbvvEhZTYYPd9cKncm0qXRRSvuFHtLWkXLE%3D)
Our nation is at a tipping point where Americans are counting on Congress to function more than ever before – and Nancy Pelosi’s leadership is failing Americans more than ever before.

Reclaiming Congress and making the necessary changes that our country needs won’t happen overnight, but it’s something that we must work towards if we’re going to live up to the great expectations of our Founding Fathers.

**Friend, this November is our chance to start righting the ship – and that starts at the ballot box!**

Before that happens, will you join me by adding your name in support of our mission to make Congress great again?
[**ADD YOUR NAME: It’s Time to Make Congress Great Again**](http://links.lahoodforcongress.com/u/click?_t=d5887efe66684ada97976ef2e9d70137&_m=539d61338c7b492a818d038085fac50f&_e=f2lt4Y2vqRbUmXOc2Y9horHc9Cf9rRb7xlx9p3V-VXG7rureYKwho3tOklDHU9Tlz0tCijNjTvgaHeC3iyo-_Bq39IkfjJw3C4Caq1cNKCoWpp9stKgUqicEV3FZnT67wMDC_ghWf5RLM0r3SaXKFTGe4XQiREWIS9YPML9MUq8V58OwmAL2kCz8QaOxlEJNhftiwi7kjEa3GjFBXwF45Q0w8IG8or4-SboPx1yV9i9XzIX8hinJILTC6LfXrlBYT_O31jSpmcxBQa2eGH74ioUiEZR-YzDs99778W9w-Hh72TBMv751y5LGiGsLgZOtxOq2Xmkvc-p8O6ONzDu56RKrC2Ywm1gsaIHbkvBopYh_SzKbMP5JmNGjTqSvNUqDPCvFIOydbT4XhaKugx_8Th57TQRTq7xbZ--VaNdsMOF0UVSPUwQ_ND35QtcHQr98MOjtG16v4Nrkd0MKgbQX3or3-jIJQppDxQF6OHHymu8%3D)
Thank you,
Darin LaHood

[**Donate Today**](http://links.lahoodforcongress.com/u/click?_t=d5887efe66684ada97976ef2e9d70137&_m=539d61338c7b492a818d038085fac50f&_e=f2lt4Y2vqRbUmXOc2Y9horHc9Cf9rRb7xlx9p3V-VXF5cXh1eMVucPxS76PVl0pptb-Jz_lSBanlGM5K-fI-ONUgRNiwYTQc_vdhZ_OFi9vGTJGdHdB5e1-AhLd9DBxls9inckR-_9YbDw2kG173miQ_eD-l0_aMr5QEH2_A0o10CzZmf280bJ59g6XK5crkYidLPt5k_cfXnYJarefOWfRq9W031hoXErD_8HFQsNlH7bYbNMdh4p0mlAaRd5vcOmrBlX9C4mPNIrvqT8tZcuiIzJMiwqcV_lBmix4ymxVSrP9wGkBLJVDBHUq5NtyxUPHDJhQHGfzz_6eWDablPhS89W25IWar9X4frZhbC64bRgbPeC5IG2hjfqB8LkG5QxcVqZl0ZWwZjgh7l8u0aMc9R0j2sAH53W1naAr5BYBXjXU6M49E11nsshSuYdxjaaKV0_V70gFf8HT_uvkd4NIyg7iiUI22Z6Po2TUJS9E%3D)

name: Kate Martin
subject: FWD: Join us for our Climate Town Hall
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Spanberger for Congress
body:
| [ ](https://act.myngp.com/el/PHPhsCFltAzjE4EPxz0i2uB0kikkuclc1Ls_mc933xc=/75KQ646DevcMP2GzYZE_DY7gLAVZ-u65sqmYpxbx8vA=?refcode=climatetownhall)
---
| Hi Peter, I want to make sure you received our invitation to tomorrow's **Climate Town Hall.** Abigail will be sitting down with Todd Stern, President Obama's chief climate negotiator who led the U.S. effort in negotiating the Paris Agreement, to discuss climate change, conservation and the environment. There is still time to join us for this important conversation! [_**Click here to sign up.**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/PHPhsCFltAzjE4EPxz0i2uB0kikkuclc1Ls_mc933xc=/6Jzlkk-IrsfEZYQ0uV6ZyWWZpDEhJQFj3ozorpk7-pY=) I hope you can join us at 2:00 pm tomorrow, _Kate Martin_ _Digital Manager _ **\---------- Forwarded message ---------** From: Team Spanberger <info2@abigailspanberger.com> Date: Fri, Oct 2, 2020 at 2:29 PM Subject: Join us for our Climate Town Hall Peter, Please join us next **Wednesday, October 7th at 2:00 PM** for a virtual town hall on climate change, conservation, and the environment! **Representative Spanberger will be joined by featured guest Todd Stern,** who served as the United States Special Envoy for Climate Change under President Obama and served as the United States' chief negotiator for the 2015 Paris Climate Agreement. _**[Sign up here!](https://act.myngp.com/el/PHPhsCFltAzjE4EPxz0i2uB0kikkuclc1Ls_mc933xc=/Bm-IDuwexrKpFC5bQm63KtfMkbiDRNT43m-X26NjGS8=)**_ [](https://act.myngp.com/el/PHPhsCFltAzjE4EPxz0i2uB0kikkuclc1Ls_mc933xc=/6Jzlkk-IrsfEZYQ0uV6ZyWWZpDEhJQFj3ozorpk7-pY=) This event is co-hosted by several of our environmental partners: **National Wildlife Action Fund Political Committee, EDF Action PAC, Sierra Club Political Committee, NRDC Action Fund PAC, and LCV Action Fund.** The event will be streamed live from Abigail's campaign social media pages, and a direct link will be provided after registration. This interactive event will include time for questions from the audience. We hope you will be able to join us on Wednesday for this important conversation!
---
| [SIGN UP HERE](https://act.myngp.com/el/PHPhsCFltAzjE4EPxz0i2uB0kikkuclc1Ls_mc933xc=/Bm-IDuwexrKpFC5bQm63KtfMkbiDRNT43m-X26NjGS8=)

Thank you _Team Spanberger_

There is still time to join us for this important conversation! = I hope you can join us at 2:00 pm tomorrow, Kate Martin Digital Manager \---------- Forwarded message --------- From: Team Spanberger <info2@abigailspanberger.com> Date: Fri, Oct 2, 2020 at 2:29 PM Subject: Join us for our Climate Town Hall Peter, Please join us next Wednesday, October 7th at 2:00 PM for a virtual town hall on climate change, conservation, and the environment! Representative Spanberger will be joined by featured guest Todd Stern, who served as the United States Special Envoy for Climate Change under President Obama and served as the United States' chief negotiator for the 2015 Paris Climate Agreement. = = This event is co-hosted by several of our environmental partners: National Wildlife Action Fund Political Committee, EDF Action PAC, Sierra Club Political Committee, NRDC Action Fund PAC, and LCV Action Fund. The event will be streamed live from Abigail's campaign social media pages, and a direct link will be provided after registration. This interactive event will include time for questions from the audience. We hope you will be able to join us on Wednesday for this important conversation! | = Thank you Team Spanberger * | | | Paid for by Spanberger for Congress Spanberger for Congress PO Box 3121 Glen Allen VA 23058 United States Abigail Spanberger is a proud Democrat, former CIA officer, and representative for Virginia's 7th Congressional District. She believes in leadership that flows from our shared American values of integrity, responsibility, and decency, and she wants to work to move this country forward together. To learn more, please visit =. | If you wish to receive fewer emails, =. =

name: Dick Durbin
subject: Tell the GOP to follow the McConnell Rule
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Dick Durbin
body:
#
Peter,
Two years ago today, Senate Republicans confirmed President Trump's highly controversial nominee, Justice Brett Kavanaugh, to a lifetime appointment on the U.S. Supreme Court.
Fast forward to today: Mitch McConnell and the GOP are chomping at the bit to confirm another right-wing justice who will help reverse the Affordable Care Act and a woman's right to choose.
**[We need to fight back, Peter. We should not fill this Supreme Court vacancy until we have our next President. Add your name to my petition now to demand the GOP follow the McConnell Rule and delay this confirmation until post-inauguration.](https://act.durbinforsenate.com/page/m/45ff45a7/42ab3cf4/67ba0edb/135d168e/4044972681/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjM0MjIzIiwiSlNWR1NWSlRWRTVCVFVVbEpRPT0iOiJQZXRlciJ9/?g=ofPncVH8x8VcsCmaF7wmZzA "https://act.durbinforsenate.com/page/s/the-supreme-court-is-at-risk?source=em201005i_1029&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&firstname=Peter")**
In February 2016, Mitch McConnell and the Senate Republicans refused to even hold a single hearing for President Obama's Supreme Court nominee, Merrick Garland, because it was a presidential election year.
Now, with less than one month until the 2020 election, McConnell and the very same Republicans are intent on ramming through President Trump's Supreme Court pick, Amy Coney Barrett.
**[The Supreme Court is at risk -- and the impacts will be felt for generations. Sign on now to tell McConnell and the GOP: no Supreme Court confirmation before Inauguration Day.](https://act.durbinforsenate.com/page/m/45ff45a7/42ab3cf4/67ba0edb/135d168e/4044972681/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjM0MjIzIiwiSlNWR1NWSlRWRTVCVFVVbEpRPT0iOiJQZXRlciJ9/?g=ofPncVH8x8VcsCmaF7wmZzA "https://act.durbinforsenate.com/page/s/the-supreme-court-is-at-risk?source=em201005i_1029&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&firstname=Peter")**
My best,
Dick Durbin

**[Sign the Petition](https://act.durbinforsenate.com/page/m/45ff45a7/42ab3cf4/67ba0edb/135d168e/4044972681/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjM0MjIzIiwiSlNWR1NWSlRWRTVCVFVVbEpRPT0iOiJQZXRlciJ9/?g=ofPncVH8x8VcsCmaF7wmZzA "https://act.durbinforsenate.com/page/s/the-supreme-court-is-at-risk?source=em201005i_1029&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&firstname=Peter")**

* * *
Paid for by Friends of Dick Durbin
---

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Should you want to unsubscribe, you can [click here](https://act.durbinforsenate.com/page/m/45ff45a7/42ab3cf4/67ba0edb/135d168f/4044972681/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/?g=ofPncVH8x8VcsCmaF7wmZzA "http://action.dickdurbin.com/page/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com"). Join Senator Durbin in taking on powerful special interests on behalf of hard-working middle class families by [making a contribution to our campaign here.](https://act.durbinforsenate.com/page/m/45ff45a7/42ab3cf4/67ba0edb/135d16f0/4044972681/VEsD/?g=ofPncVH8x8VcsCmaF7wmZzA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/durbin_footer")
Friends of Dick Durbin
Attn: Online Department
101 W. Grand, Suite 200
Chicago, IL 60654

name: Mark Kelly
subject: Please let me explain
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
The future of health care and protections for pre-existing conditions are all on the ballot this November. It's never been more critical that we win here in Arizona.
Hi there --
In a moment, I'm going to ask you to split a $3 contribution between my people-powered campaign and Senator Hassan's. First, let me explain why this request is so important.
Arizona has always been a must-win for Democrats to flip the Senate. But Mitch McConnell is spending millions of dollars against me in Arizona, and the gravity of this election has increased tremendously.
That's why I need you.
[**We set our biggest fundraising goal _ ever_ this month, and we can't afford to fall short -- not when there is so much on the line. Will you split a $3 donation between my campaign and Senator Hassan's to help flip this seat?**](https://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc55d/2a380d31/20bf04a4/f0b5b3/146181831/VEsH/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiMjAyMF9td2g0a2VsbHkiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6ImUyMDIwMTAwNl9NV0g0TUtfbmEiLCJlM3NnVEZCQlFWRjFaWEo1VTNSeWFXNW5JSDE5IjoiMywyNSw1MCwxMDAsMjUwIn0%3D/?g=YHsLejpTVzRXNXNZdVQ0tHA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/2020_mwh4kelly?refcode=e20201006_MWH4MK_na&amounts=3,25,50,100,250")
Mitch McConnell is spending massive sums to boost my opponent. He just dropped $10.6 million here and Trump has already visited Arizona five times this year.
The future of health care and protections for pre-existing conditions are all on the ballot this November. It's never been more critical that we win here in Arizona.
[**We've got less than a month to go and there's no time to hold back. Please chip in $3 or whatever you can to flip Arizona and defeat Mitch McConnell's majority once and for all.**](https://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc55d/2a380d31/20bf04a4/f0b5b3/146181831/VEsE/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiMjAyMF9td2g0a2VsbHkiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6ImUyMDIwMTAwNl9NV0g0TUtfbmEiLCJlM3NnVEZCQlFWRjFaWEo1VTNSeWFXNW5JSDE5IjoiMywyNSw1MCwxMDAsMjUwIn0%3D/?g=YHsLejpTVzRXNXNZdVQ0tHA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/2020_mwh4kelly?refcode=e20201006_MWH4MK_na&amounts=3,25,50,100,250")

subject: Have you seen the lies being funded by liberal megadonors?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FEENSTRA FOR CONGRESS
body:
|
---
| |
---
| | Friend,
---
| This morning, I saw that my opponent has decided to spend hundreds of thousands of dollars on television ads slandering me. The ads are dishonest, but what really bothers me is that they’re being bankrolled by extreme progressives from California and New York – people that don’t care about Iowa, our hopes, or our concerns.

All they care about is getting another Democrat elected.

Over the course of the past few years, my opponent has received over three million dollars from outside the state of Iowa - from liberals and leftists that have money to blow trying to harvest votes for an agenda that leaves states like ours in the dust.

And my opponent is happily taking their money, just like he’ll happily vote for the Bernie Sanders agenda.
---
| I need your help to push back against these dishonest advertisements and the deep pockets of cynical liberals that are just trying to buy another pawn for the liberal agenda. If you’ve got $5, $10, or $20 to spare, please consider chipping in at the link below – and thank you for all of your support.

-Randy
---

The ads are dishonest, but what really bothers me is that they’re being bankrolled by extreme progressives from California and New York – people that don’t care about Iowa, our hopes, or our concerns. All they care about is getting another Democrat elected. Over the course of the past few years, my opponent has received over three million dollars from outside the state of Iowa - from liberals and leftists that have money to blow trying to harvest votes for an agenda that leaves states like ours in the dust. And my opponent is happily taking their money, just like he’ll happily vote for the Bernie Sanders agenda. | I need your help to push back against these dishonest advertisements and the deep pockets of cynical liberals that are just trying to buy another pawn for the liberal agenda. If you’ve got $5, $10, or $20 to spare, please consider chipping in at the link below – and thank you for all of your support. -Randy | "Chip in here!" | | | | PAID FOR BY FEENSTRA FOR CONGRESS | Feenstra For Congress641 2nd StHull, IA 51239-7323 Want to change how you receive these emails? body:
Hey, did you have a chance to read this email from last night?
| Hey, did you have a chance to read this email from last night? There's something different about the newest negative ad my team flagged for you...

**This time, House Republicans ' political machine literally circled me out in red marker. It's never been clearer that I'm their NUMBER ONE House target this fall. **

The GOP establishment wants nothing more than to see us lose on November 3rd, so we have to fight back harder than ever before. This is a critical moment for our campaign, and I'm asking you personally to step up.

Please, donate here immediately: [**https://secure.actblue.com/donate/roseq42020?refcode=NRCCattackads**](https://act.myngp.com/el/8UmHC0SKdxogS2Ag0JeF_LPk7r2dNL7w_ix0659D3R4=/qTFxnl-CXpkDoQtrfOB6wr4-SQsGcLQOhpzvO1cpcjM=?refcode=em_fr_2020.10.06_b2_ummr_inac&amount=25)

We only have four weeks left to beat them.

Proud to have you by my side,

_Max Rose_

name: Team Heinrich
subject: 🚨 Last day to register to vote online! 🚨
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MARTIN HEINRICH FOR SENATE
body:
[](https://nm.martinheinrich.com/page/m/4b75ae54/43d8135f/6428bcc1/51067697/1667491910/VEsH/?g=EoemE2V4ADlaKjl2zM0Tbw "https://martinheinrich.com/")
---
Hey, are you registered to vote this Election Day? **If you 're not registered yet, today is the last day to do so online in order to vote in this year's general election.** You can also register in person until Saturday, October 31st, by heading to your County Clerk's office. | [REGISTER TO VOTE NOW](https://nm.martinheinrich.com/page/m/4b75ae54/43d8135f/6428bcc1/51067696/1667491910/VEsE/?g=EoemE2V4ADlaKjl2zM0Tbw "https://portal.sos.state.nm.us/ovr/webpages/instructionsstep1.aspx")
---
[CHECK MY REGISTRATION](https://nm.martinheinrich.com/page/m/4b75ae54/43d8135f/6428bcc1/51067699/1667491910/VEsF/?g=EoemE2V4ADlaKjl2zM0Tbw "https://voterportal.servis.sos.state.nm.us/wheretovote.aspx")
---
This will be one of the most important elections of our lifetimes. From the White House, to the Senate, to the Supreme Court, there's too much on the ballot to sit this one out.
We have just 28 days to go! Martin and all of us on Team Heinrich are focused on making sure every New Mexican can make their voice heard this Election Day. The future of our community, our state, and our country depend on it.
-- Team Heinrich
| PAID FOR BY MARTIN HEINRICH FOR SENATE
---

clean_body: "" Hey, are you registered to vote this Election Day? If you 're not registered yet, today is the last day to do so online in order to vote in this year's general election. You can also register in person until Saturday, October 31st, by heading to your County Clerk's office. | "" "" This will be one of the most important elections of our lifetimes. From the White House, to the Senate, to the Supreme Court, there's too much on the ballot to sit this one out. We have just 28 days to go! Martin and all of us on Team Heinrich are focused on making sure every New Mexican can make their voice heard this Election Day. The future of our community, our state, and our country depend on it. -- Team Heinrich | PAID FOR BY MARTIN HEINRICH FOR SENATE PO Box 25763 Albuquerque, NM 87125 ""

subject: Will Douglas Outraises Rhetta Bowers Again, Holds More Than 5-to-1 Cash Advantage
body:
Douglas outraised Bowers $450,556 to $180,175, and currently holds a cash on hand advantage of $401,426 to $74,693. | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/willdouglasfortexas/fundraising-october-6-2020?e=4f010155df)
---
| | [ ](https://willdouglasfortexas.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f04ec3916ea34d520e31df9fc&id=78bbffdb17&e=4f010155df)
---
| | **FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE**
October 6, 2020
---
**CONTACT:[Trevor Naglieri](mailto:trevor@highpostgroup.com?subject=Will%20Douglas%20\(TX-HD-113\))**
(508) 826-5135
---
| **Will Douglas Outraises Rhetta Bowers Again,
Holds More Than 5-to-1 Cash Advantage**
**Dallas, TX** – Will Douglas, Republican nominee for Texas House District 113, today reported to the Texas Ethics Commission a July 1 to September 24 fundraising total of $450,556. Incumbent State Representative Rhetta Bowers (D) reported raising a total of $180,175.

Over the last three reporting periods combined, Douglas has outraised Bowers $824,909 to $325,875, and currently holds a cash on hand advantage of $401,426 to $74,693.

**Will Douglas comments on the campaign's latest TEC report:**
_"As we head into the start of early voting I'm incredibly grateful to all of our supporters for enthusiastically backing our vision for a new generation of leadership in Texas House District 113. This report reflects the momentum we have felt on the ground since launching last year. We will continue to build on one of the strongest grassroots operations in the state heading into the start of early voting next week."_

**Trevor Naglieri, Campaign Manager, comments on the campaign's latest TEC report:**
_"Only 7 days out from early voting, our campaign has strong momentum and the resources necessary to tell Will's story as a self-made pharmacist and small business owner. Voters are excited about Will and ready to hold the incumbent accountable for her failed leadership and extreme views."_
_###_
Will Douglas is a self-made pharmacy owner and graduate of the University of Oklahoma College of Pharmacy. Through hard work and long hours, Will purchased several small pharmacies and currently manages his own business, Crimson Care Pharmacy Group. Named one of Dallas County’s “40 under 40,” Will is running for office to ensure the next generation of Texans can live in a state where the economy is strong and our communities are safe.
[www.WillDouglasForTexas.com](https://willdouglasfortexas.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f04ec3916ea34d520e31df9fc&id=2aeab67a48&e=4f010155df)

From supporting tribal c | | | [**Today I’m asking you to send in a $25 donation to support my campaign.**](http://links.tomohalleran.com/u/click?_t=63bcf327664141c1a59a283fcc863b63&_m=5f443cbe7bb04062bda1e2726b7002bc&_e=5bMYf0MvrB3IzZrhPGKhG8uNWcVKXAu3CnAs7RsetZiWNpeGUinh_NieXlypQ0_qkNK8IaYxUhYl9GZb2P7krPN08ElMJ1N2iTHhQHD1FB-k23YUxHAkQNEmUGBBb9iVlNJgDAG614_-2tcDWeUBuHUPTvQdX4pBe3v9tirfMx6BAZTBOL1eW3DrUES53AsZHWVVekc5KuSw8ulUfXXaVsys1JtSFcPtt8i3x2926Z6V2uFV2plb1mI6Bm2b-LOGzsM1p3AYgJrZz7FUWPhNvsDyCWzOKgU8WGne7L9bAQLE37WfpTf5fs_F5H2ex9_2mV7ty_Z1jRFapGlq8T6TPiPUpOGUBSDUsPFkuR4Fl8lDQSrMmIj3TAZs_y2OFMjIJCf5-qomXGqf6Uc43aNdpwdD6gDySKCA77JsWuTv1GrADYl1PufAfw57kEstx-kjV1wokQhechV6fJU4xXSc0rH87Z7meFY1EO5uJSNTKk5qt40f8niOwqXOk3XpVUjt) But first, let me tell you why I need your support: Ever since I first stepped into Congress, it has been my mission to fight for the best interests of Arizona’s first district. From supporting tribal communities and our national parks, to expanding affordable healthcare and lowering prescription drug prices, I have always fought to make sure our Arizona families are well-represented. Now, the election is only 28 days away and early voting is kicking off tomorrow morning! That means we need to ramp up our Get Out the Vote efforts to make sure people vote early and return their ballots as soon as they get them. ---

---
id:2020-04-23-15:43:59:705t
---
| Hoosier Republican,

While Election Day might be right around the corner, you don’t have to wait another 28 days to cast your vote!

In Indiana, registered voters can vote early in-person starting TODAY.
---
| [Find your Early Vote Location >> ](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=b5e016b0ed&e=1acd9bb3d6 "Find your Early Vote Location >> ")
---
| No matter where you are in Indiana, there are Republicans counting on YOU to cast your ballot. We need EVERY Hoosier Republican to support our ticket to help Governor Holcomb and our Republican team continue building One Indiana for All!

Want to avoid potentially long lines? Won’t be home on Election Day? We have you covered. Voting early in-person is a safe, secure alternative to going to the polls on Election Day. _**It’s a great way to maintain social distancing and avoid long lines!**_
---
| [Find your Early Vote Location >> ](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=822e4a5065&e=1acd9bb3d6 "Find your Early Vote Location >> ")
---
| **Times and locations vary from county to county, so[be sure to check out our official election center](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=4d61604184&e=1acd9bb3d6) so you know when and where to vote early**.

It’s more important than ever that every Hoosier gets to the polls and votes.

Hopefully we’ve made it just a little bit easier for you to find the info you need to make your voice heard at the ballot box!

Thanks,
Indiana GOP

name: =?utf-8?Q?David=20Oks?=
subject: A video from the Gravel Institute
body:
The Gravel Institute's second video is out. With Zephyr Teachout on "freedom" under monopoly capitalism. | |
---
| | |
# A short video. You'll like it.

Hey ,

I'm proud to send you our second five-minute video from the Gravel Institute, presenting **Zephyr Teachout** on how modern capitalism inhibits freedom. (I think this is our best one so far.) You can watch it below.
---
| [ ](https://gravelinstitute.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4840f01d672bb468321c6d3b8&id=208af3f5b1&e=85f7472d66 "Capitalism vs. Freedom")
---
A good video, we hope.
| We've seen an incredible reaction since we launched last week, and we're way ahead of where we thought we'd be. (And still sorting through our messages!) I'll be sending a status update to patrons later today.

We're happy to get to work on our goal – creating videos to educate people on left ideas, and respond to right-wing propaganda. And if you like Zephyr's video – _subscribe, like, comment, and send it to the centrists and conservatives in your life._

As always, join us on YouTube:
---
| [Check out our channel](https://gravelinstitute.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4840f01d672bb468321c6d3b8&id=087d88e797&e=85f7472d66 "Check out our channel")
---
| And if you want to help out, become a patron! It allows us to expand.
---
| [Become a patron!](https://gravelinstitute.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4840f01d672bb468321c6d3b8&id=cd4651179f&e=85f7472d66 "Become a patron!")
---
| And again, I want to thank you for your help as we get started on this project. I could not be more grateful. And as always feel free to email me, I'll respond!
---
| In Solidarity,
David Oks
**The Gravel Institute**

name: Gina Raimondo
subject: Reaching 90%
body:
---
| | | | | |
---
| Hello friend,
This year, getting your flu vaccination is going to be more important than ever before. We can't let our emergency departments and our healthcare system get overrun by waves of people dealing with the flu while also responding to COVID-19. We need to protect ourselves from a serious flu outbreak this season and the best way to do that is to get vaccinated.
Fortunately, Rhode Island normally does very well when it comes to flu vaccination. We're usually the best or the second-best vaccinated state in the country. In an average year, about 55% of adults get their flu shots and about 75% of kids get their flu shots in Rhode Island. That's good news, but that also means that hundreds of thousands of Rhode Islanders don't get their flu shots. This year, I know that we can do even better.
So, the Department of Health is setting a goal of getting 90% of Rhode Islanders vaccinated against the flu this season. Let me be clear: that's a huge jump, and it won't be easy. But we've got a plan to make it easier than ever to get vaccinated. We've already purchased 150,000 more flu vaccination doses than we normally do, and we're bringing them to every corner of the state. Vaccines will be available at hundreds of community clinics, schools, COVID-19 testing sites, pharmacies, nursing homes, doctors' offices, and other sites throughout the state.
We're also partnering with local community partners and our Health Equity Zones to make sure that we have clinics available to Rhode Islanders who rely on public transportation, speak a language other than English, or face other barriers to getting the flu shot in a regular year. Even if you don't have insurance, you'll still be able to get vaccinated at no cost.
This is a big task to take on, but I know that together, we can reach 90%. So, I'm asking you to make a plan today to get you and your family vaccinated, and together we can protect the health of everyone in Rhode Island.
We're all in this together.
-Gina Raimondo Governor
P.S.: Information is our greatest weapon in the fight against COVID-19. If you or someone you know wants to sign up to receive these emails, you can use [this link](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Wr3sMSvGtzvIqhI1BIl716r4tujIjD4AQicW3DgQTEjY3uoctR40JljZeXg_CwyGmXG7YpOUZXa0twDfF9gOdAHWmX5U4AivG_DW2_pOlULQhPT98RwGhMFE75z3dgPqxZ7dlg6teFmjuOktyxtfi_bc8Gi-T7-AVMSlwNLegwmxa3vQ9d7VRah4VoXgm8A0B-jXLFErXOq0FCih--gagG9ALaDkqTm3QUhfsV6-wxhUQosPvfR3pJ5HxGgiyLJFEj8Wd7AuYfUffSyEVII8vVQ9vaGf5I_toHpLWPYOBDEYIhv3iS1anlYKcO_5Hc3aEdvUjlQkIlA=&c=2_ZokSVdClDZZGEsqasS4A9vMooH4aLBylx18iFXhUsad5_zO4yAQQ==&ch=G3w7JDjZjX-1gXjIRQqydPxpT52kBciEhzG3hrOj4sxbbuCHonlnDQ==).

clean_body: | | | | | | | Hello friend, This year, getting your flu vaccination is going to be more important than ever before. We can't let our emergency departments and our healthcare system get overrun by waves of people dealing with the flu while also responding to COVID-19. We need to protect ourselves from a serious flu outbreak this season and the best way to do that is to get vaccinated. Fortunately, Rhode Island normally does very well when it comes to flu vaccination. We're usually the best or the second-best vaccinated state in the country. In an average year, about 55% of adults get their flu shots and about 75% of kids get their flu shots in Rhode Island. That's good news, but that also means that hundreds of thousands of Rhode Islanders don't get their flu shots. This year, I know that we can do even better. So, the Department of Health is setting a goal of getting 90% of Rhode Islanders vaccinated against the flu this season. Let me be clear: that's a huge jump, and it won't be easy. But we've got a plan to make it easier than ever to get vaccinated. We've already purchased 150,000 more flu vaccination doses than we normally do, and we're bringing them to every corner of the state. Vaccines will be available at hundreds of community clinics, schools, COVID-19 testing sites, pharmacies, nursing homes, doctors' offices, and other sites throughout the state. We're also partnering with local community partners and our Health Equity Zones to make sure that we have clinics available to Rhode Islanders who rely on public transportation, speak a language other than English, or face other barriers to getting the flu shot in a regular year. Even if you don't have insurance, you'll still be able to get vaccinated at no cost. This is a big task to take on, but I know that together, we can reach 90%. So, I'm asking you to make a plan today to get you and your family vaccinated, and together we can protect the health of everyone in Rhode Island. We're all in this together. -Gina Raimondo Governor P.S.: Information is our greatest weapon in the fight against COVID-19. If you or someone you know wants to sign up to receive these emails, you can use ==. | == | Click the graph to see check the Department of Health's ==. | | Governor's Office | 82 Smith Street, Providence, RI 02903 | | Sent by mailto:communications@governor.ri.gov powered by
