name: =?utf-8?Q?Dani?=
subject: Trump calls off negotiations re: COVID relief
body:
I’ve been talking a lot lately about the gridlock in Congress and my frustration with our legislature’s inability to work in good faith | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/e2f0b1831a6c/trump-calls-off-negotiations-re-covid-relief?e=140a9b81e7)
---
| |
---
| |
#
I’ve been talking a lot lately about the gridlock in Congress and my frustration with our legislature’s inability to work in good faith on behalf of the people in this country who are struggling with the pandemic and attendant economic distress. We’ve seen bill after bill come for a vote, lengthy negotiations, and we’ve come to expect that the federal government will be hamstrung by partisanship and a patent unwillingness to negotiate.

Just yesterday, my opponent, the always ill-prepared Adam Kinzinger, **defended his failure to support the House’s COVID relief package** with a stumbling response that offered no substantive reason for his reticence. And this afternoon, President Trump ended negotiations entirely.

This kind of political hostage-taking has consequences \-- the lives and livelihoods of people all over this country are at stake -- and we’ve got an epic failure of leadership on our hands.

One of the things that excites me most about being elected is surprising people with my willingness to vote for bipartisan legislation. Give me a bill that’s going to help the people of IL-16, and you can bet I’m going to enthusiastically support it, regardless of who proposed it. **A good idea is a good idea. **

[Help me get there by making a donation today. ](https://daniforillinois.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=16d8d19eb3a417b5b09061c0d&id=8b80380944&e=140a9b81e7)

Thanks so much,
Dani

subject: Priorities

body:

| Peter,

**My priorities are you and your security**. That means **jobs** : getting us back to work quickly and safely. It means **health care** : protecting those with preexisting conditions and reducing drug prices. It also means fully **funding and supporting law enforcement**.

__**Here's the truth about where Colin Allred stands:**_

• Voted to **eliminate $600 million for law enforcement**

• Supported **raising taxes on small businesses during the shutdown**

**• Stayed silent as Dallas radicals tried to defund the police**_ Our district does not share Colin Allred's priorities or values. If you agree, [please contribute $100, $500, $1,000, or whatever you can](https://gcforcongress.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=eb0e2b7e83008912623ba9a3e&id=0525739cbc&e=68aaeb0998), so that I can keep my new ad, "Priorities" on the air!

| **I'm not a politician; I'm a businesswoman who will go to Congress to solve problems,** not play political games with your livelihood.

[Our district is ready for new leadership. Help us keep our message on the air through Election Day.](https://gcforcongress.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=eb0e2b7e83008912623ba9a3e&id=6a3aad0b57&e=68aaeb0998) Every dollar helps, and no amount is too small!

Thank you and God bless,

name: Elizabeth Warren
subject: Tied in Mississippi
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren Democrats
body:
If you're looking for a place where your next donation will make a real difference -- to help take back the Senate and elect someone who fights for working people -- Mike's your guy. | | | [](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/285251db/45c30650/1c1005e99/66e886e0/1522559061/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVm1hWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWc1lYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://elizabethwarren.com?source=em-header&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326")
---
This summer, I was honored to endorse Mike Espy for Senate in Mississippi.

Now, the latest poll shows **Mike Espy is down by just one point -- a virtual tie.** He raised more money in the first two days of October than his Republican incumbent opponent had on hand at the end of June.

So understand this: He has real momentum. **He can win this race, help Democrats take back the Senate, and make history as the state's first Black senator since Reconstruction -- as long as we stay in the fight by his side.**

**[If you can, please split a donation of $2 or whatever you can to support Mike Espy's campaign and Warren Democrats. Your contribution would be an investment in one of Democrats' best chances to flip a Senate seat-- and help elect champions for working people up and down the ballot.](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/285251db/45c30650/1c1005e99/66e886e3/1522559061/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6IndkLWV3LW1lIiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJFTVcwMkZfRUdSX0VORF9FXzIwMjAxMDA2X1YxUzFfUCJ9/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.elizabethwarren.com/donate/wd-ew-me?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMW02F_EGR_END_E_20201006_V1S1_P")**

Mike is exactly the kind of hopeful, hard-working, and dedicated public servant that we need more of in the Senate.

He has spent his career fighting for working families, from his time serving Mississippi as a congressman, to becoming the first Black U.S. Department of Agriculture secretary in U.S. history. Mike is ready to fight for each and every Mississippian with empathy and determination -- to expand affordable health care, broadband, and quality public education.

He knows how to fight -- and he knows how to win. He's built up muscle memory and a powerful grassroots organization from a track record of running strong campaigns in Mississippi. With grassroots donations pouring in from across the country, he said in a recent interview that his campaign knows exactly where to invest each dollar -- down to the neighborhood level -- to lead to victory.

So if you're looking for a place where your next donation will make a real difference -- to help take back the Senate and elect someone who fights for working people -- Mike's your guy.

**[If you're able to make a financial contribution right now, will you split a donation to help elect Mike Espy and support Warren Democrats across the country?](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/285251db/45c30650/1c1005e99/66e886e3/1522559061/VEsEAw/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6IndkLWV3LW1lIiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJFTVcwMkZfRUdSX0VORF9FXzIwMjAxMDA2X1YxUzFfUCJ9/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.elizabethwarren.com/donate/wd-ew-me?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMW02F_EGR_END_E_20201006_V1S1_P")**

Thanks for being a part of this,

Elizabeth
| [**DONATE NOW**](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/285251db/45c30650/1c1005e99/66e886e3/1522559061/VEsEAg/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6IndkLWV3LW1lIiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJFTVcwMkZfRUdSX0VORF9FXzIwMjAxMDA2X1YxUzFfUCJ9/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.elizabethwarren.com/donate/wd-ew-me?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMW02F_EGR_END_E_20201006_V1S1_P")

With grassroots donations pouring in from across the country, he said in a recent interview that his campaign knows exactly where to invest each dollar -- down to the neighborhood level -- to lead to victory. So if you're looking for a place where your next donation will make a real difference -- to help take back the Senate and elect someone who fights for working people -- Mike's your guy. "" Thanks for being a part of this, Elizabeth | "" | | | "" | "" | "" | "" | "" | "" ---|---|---|---|---|--- | Paid for by Warren Democrats All content (C) 2020 Warren Democrats, All Rights Reserved PO Box 171375, Boston, MA 02117

name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: NEW: President Trump proclaims ‘Made in America’ Week!
body:
Each year, President Trump welcomes businesses to the White House from every American state to display their goods... | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=a2121d5de9&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| The White House • October 6, 2020
---
| | |
# **NEW: President Trump proclaims ‘Made in America’ Week!**

**Each year, President Trump** welcomes businesses to the White House from every American state to display their goods at the Made in America Showcase.

**“Buy American, Hire American”** is more than a motto for President Trump. It is the strategy that has driven his entire Administration’s economic agenda. [His Proclamation](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=dceb38ce62&e=3ee4985eea) on Made in America Day and Made in America Week 2020 reads, in part:
| | _For too long, politicians failed to recognize the critical importance of using American labor to make American goods, so that the profits and jobs stay here at home. They enabled American companies to ship their jobs overseas and sat by while foreign companies ripped off our products . . ._ |
---|---|---

**Fifty U.S. companies** were invited to take part in this year’s Made in America Showcase. While unable to come together in person this year, many of these great businesses shared videos online explaining the importance of “Made in America!”

**🎬** [**Goya Foods: Started by an immigrant to live the American Dream!**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=0a1065166a&e=3ee4985eea)

**“Goya was started** nearly 85 years ago by my grandfather, who came to the country as an immigrant to live and fulfill the American Dream,” Goya Foods CEO Robert Unanue said. “And we have fulfilled that dream.”

**Another company,** Mountain Ridge Gear of Colorado, shared its passion for using American-sourced materials for its products. “As long as this company exists, we will use American-made products to build our gear,” owner Eric Lynn said.

**🎬** [**Mountain Ridge Gear: A veteran-owned, family-run business!**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=76aadaf571&e=3ee4985eea)

**Kan Jam—** a gaming business based in Buffalo, New York—“is proud to be Made in America,” the company tweeted. “Thank you to the current administration for creating an environment conducive for American based manufacturing!”

**🎬** [**Kan Jam: An American company born and raised in Buffalo, NY!**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=03079f1ff8&e=3ee4985eea)

**In every state,** small and large businesses such as these are putting patriotism first and contributing to our nation’s Great American Comeback under President Trump.

**“The President** extends his sincere appreciation to the companies that planned to attend this year’s event at the White House,” Press Secretary Kayleigh McEnany said in a statement. “He is incredibly proud of their grit, ingenuity, and use of American labor to manufacture exceptional products in the homeland.”

**President Trump** says “Made in America” isn’t a slogan. It is a solemn pledge.

**“On every front,** my Administration will continue to fight for American workers, American jobs, and American businesses to ensure prosperity today and for America’s future generations.”

📖 [**See the full list of American companies invited to the showcase!**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=81db10f24e&e=3ee4985eea)

📖 [**President Trump’s Administration lives by two simple rules! **](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=7a8f5f4407&e=3ee4985eea)
|
---
|
